title: docs(ops): NRFI/YRFI SGO gap documented
root_cause: SGO does not provide a dedicated NRFI/YRFI boolean market key for MLB. No nrfi, yrfi, -yn, or yes/no first-inning variants exist in the SGO MLB offer set.

fix.change: Added §2026-04-21 NRFI/YRFI gap entry: confirmed absence of SGO key, documented closest proxy (points-all-1i-ou at line ≤0.5), flagged derivation path and SGO support request as required next steps. Added future unlock row.

runtime_change_note: No schema, code, or data changes. Gap documented; no implementation until SGO confirms availability or derivation approach is ratified.

db_verification.query: SELECT DISTINCT provider_market_key FROM provider_offers WHERE sport_key = 'MLB' AND provider_market_key ILIKE ANY(ARRAY['%nrfi%','%yrfi%','%-yn%','%firstInning%'])
